delivery.title: Delivery Information
delivery.subtitle: Complete your details to receive your order
delivery.error: Could not place order. Please try again.

footer.implicitConsent: By placing an order, you agree to our personal data processing policy.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy and Personal Data Processing

dataController.title: 1. Data Controller
dataController.content: The data controller is [COMPANY NAME], identified with NIT [NIT], located at [ADDRESS], Colombia. Email: [EMAIL]. Phone: [PHONE].

purpose.title: 2. Purpose of Data Processing
purpose.content: Your personal data will be processed for:
items: Communicating with you about your order status

rights.title: 4. Data Subject Rights
rights.content: Under Colombian Law 1581 of 2012, you have the right to:
items: Know, update, and rectify your data
Be informed about the use of your data
Revoke authorization and request deletion of your data
File complaints with the Superintendence of Industry and Commerce

retention.title: 5. Data Retention
retention.content: Your data will be kept while you maintain a relationship with us and for the time necessary to comply with legal and contractual obligations.

security.title: 6. Security Measures
security.content: We implement technical and organizational measures to protect your data against unauthorized access, loss, or alteration.

exerciseRights.title: 7. How to Exercise Your Rights
exerciseRights.content: To exercise your rights, you can:
items: Request data deletion on our website

complaints.title: 8. Data Protection Authority
complaints.content: If you believe your rights have been violated, you can file a complaint with the Superintendence of Industry and Commerce (SIC).

delete.title: Data Deletion Request
delete.description: Enter your phone number to request the deletion of your personal data from our system.
delete.phoneInvalid: Enter a valid Colombian phone number
delete.confirmLabel: I confirm that I want to permanently delete my data and understand this includes my order history.
delete.successMessage: Your data has been deleted from our system.
delete.errorNotFound: We could not find an account associated with this phone number.
delete.warning: Warning: This action is permanent and will delete all your data, including order history.
